source_request: Plan GitHub issue #1: Define Kontour Console V0 Event Stream Contract

criteria.description: A spec lists required fields for KontourConsoleEvent.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: explicit required/optional field table covering schema, version, id, type, occurredAt, producer, scope, subject, and payload.

criteria.description: A spec lists v0 event types and their intended use.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: event vocabulary table covering claim status/freshness, process progress, gates, review items, evidence, decisions, actions, and exceptions.

criteria.description: A local JSONL file convention is documented.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: local-first JSONL path, line format, append-only, ordering, idempotency, correlation, causation, backfill, and replay guidance.

criteria.description: At least three example event sequences exist: Surface claim freshness, Flow gate route-back, Campfit field review.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: examples are linked from the spec and use the v0 envelope.

criteria.description: The spec states how projections are rebuilt from events.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: deterministic replay/folding, event-id idempotency, ordering, derivedFrom metadata, link accumulation, and snapshot fallback are documented.

goal_fit.summary: Pending execution and verification of the v0 event stream contract docs/examples.
open_gaps: Implementation has not yet updated the spec or examples.
No verifier evidence has been recorded yet.
